title: Layout & Polish
changes: Responsive layout — 4 breakpoints from mobile (640px) to ultrawide (1800px+), no more wasted screen space
Center-aligned everything: section headers, table headers, table cells, cards, filter bars, stat boxes
Checklists and technique lists: centered block with left-aligned text inside
Tile centering fixed: technique cards, combo chips, collaboration items
Multi-type badges: top 3 PRs show correct types from PR titles (#549 Neural+TTT, #414 Neural, #641 Neural Non-Record)
Wider content areas: checklists/technique lists at 600px, guide-compare at 900px
All bulleted lists: centered block with left-aligned text inside (changelog, rule history, bug alerts, compute guide)
Pods vs Serverless comparison: bullet points restored

title: Funding Transparency — Verified
changes: Full compute audit: $1,035.82 param golf across 3 platforms, $867.70 self-funded
RunPod: $643.39 — 35 Stripe transactions, dashboard verified, daily breakdown
Modal: $342.48 param golf across 2 workspaces (56 apps total, 46 PYTHIA apps code-audited and separated)
Colab: $49.95 — 5 Google Pay receipts for compute units
PYTHIA research ($415.27) cleanly separated — all 46 benchmark scripts audited for pgolf references, zero found
First VERIFIED proof level in the funding tracker — full audit JSON with methodology published
Automated changelog: single source of truth in data/changelog.json

title: Filterable Leaderboards
changes: Unified column order: Status | # | PR | Author | BPB | Seeds | Artifact | Type | Track
Clickable filter buttons above both tables (Status, Type, Track)
Type badges: Neural / Cache / TTT / Hybrid (from classifier)
Track badges: Record / Non-Record (from PR title and file paths)
Pipeline generates all badges and data attributes automatically

title: Classification Overhaul
changes: Neural leaderboard requires 3/3 seeds AND known artifact size
Classifier adds track (record/non-record) and technique_type (neural/cache/ttt/hybrid)
Tighter ALIVE requirements in pipeline

title: Community Bug Alerts
changes: Added bug alerts: BPB underestimation (#897) and INT6 scale clamp (#775)
Enabled Issues and Discussions on fork

title: UX Overhaul
changes: Changelog moved to bottom of page
Navigation updated — all sections linked in correct order
Scrollable leaderboard tables with sticky headers
Neural-only leaderboard cleaned — removed PRs with BPB < 0.5
Archive sorted ALIVE-first
Technique card text centering fixed
BPB floor gate added to classifier

title: All Phases Shipped
changes: GitHub Actions cron — auto-updates every 30 minutes
6 issue templates for community input
Community issue ingestion pipeline (fetch_community.py)

title: Community Input
changes: Issue templates: funding, corrections, techniques, blocked, resources, feedback
fetch_community.py — auto-processes GitHub Issues
Pipeline integration — community input runs before classification

title: Analytics

BPB timeline — inline SVG chart, March 27 cliff marked
Collaboration finder — who's working on what, untried combinations

Compliance engine — auto-classifies ALIVE / DEAD / AT-RISK / INCOMPLETE
Cached + incremental fetching
